reason: page-agent@1.12.1 does not expose a usable non-demo browser bundle for static HTML integration. dist/esm/page-agent.js (722 B) requires bundler + @page-agent/* packages. dist/iife/page-agent.demo.js (209 KB) is the only standalone IIFE but is demo-only (auto-init, free testing API, CDN). No production bundle could be vendored.
